segments.text: But he's in a fantastic spot, Hurt dropping carpet bombs on him, tries again with that C4, no dice, off to the corner, going high, yet again, we saw what happened last time, and it happens yet again!

full_text: But he's in a fantastic spot, Hurt dropping carpet bombs on him, tries again with that C4, no dice, off to the corner, going high, yet again, we saw what happened last time, and it happens yet again!
